name: 20 GM Hydroquinone Tretinoin And Mometasone Cream
about: The 20 GM Hydroquinone Tretinoin And Mometasone Cream is an effective solution for various skin problems. This cream is suitable for all skin types and comes in a white color. It is easy to use and should be stored in a dry place. The cream contains hydroquinone, tretinoin, and mometasone, which are known for their skin lightening, anti-aging, and anti-inflammatory properties. It helps to reduce the appearance of dark spots, wrinkles, and fine lines. The cream also helps to even out skin tone and improve skin texture. It is a great choice for those looking to achieve a brighter, smoother, and more youthful-looking skin.

faq.q: How often should I use this cream?
faq.a: The frequency of use depends on your skin type and the severity of your skin problems. It is recommended to use it once a day, preferably at night, and to consult with a dermatologist before use.

faq.q: Is this cream safe for sensitive skin?
faq.a: Yes, the cream is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. However, it is advisable to do a patch test before use to check for any adverse reactions.

faq.q: How long will it take to see results?
faq.a: The results may vary depending on the severity of your skin problems. However, you should start seeing noticeable improvements within 4-6 weeks of regular use.

faq.q: Can I use this cream while going out in the sun?
faq.a: It is recommended to avoid direct sun exposure while using this cream as it may cause skin irritation and sensitivity. It is best to apply sunscreen with a high SPF before going out in the sun.
No, this cream is not disposable. It should be stored in a dry place and used until the expiry date.
